title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXCIII. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Blue eye beauty,
        Grey eye greedy,
        Black eye blackie,
        Brown eye brownie.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXCIII. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
